_meta.description: Data shapes for the Trees screen. Each tree is a permanent GPS-pinned record with monthly photo confirmation. Survival is the metric. The credit threshold — 50 trees at 90-day confirmed survival — is the connection between daily care and the Urban Greening Credit market.

TreeRecord._description: Immutable identity record per tree. monthlyUpdates is an embedded array — appended to, never edited. Dead trees are set to status=dead, never deleted.
TreeRecord.treeRef: string — human-readable sequential ref, e.g. T-0042. Generated by a Cloud Function on create.
TreeRecord.species: string — from TreeSpecies controlled enum, not free text
TreeRecord.commonName: string — denormalized display name, e.g. Grevillea, Neem, Acacia

location.lat: number — GPS auto-captured on planting log, cannot be manually entered
location.zoneId: string | null — collectionZone if tree is within an org zone

TreeRecord.status: enum: current | overdue | critical | unconfirmed | dead | removed

survival.creditEligible: boolean — true ONLY when status=current AND survivalConfirmed90Day=true

updateSchedule.nextUpdateDueAt: timestamp | null — advances 30 days on each successful update
updateSchedule.overdueThresholdDays: number — default 30, tree turns amber after this
updateSchedule.criticalThresholdDays: number — default 60, tree turns red after this

TreeRecord.monthlyUpdates: array<TreeUpdate> — append-only. Max ~36 entries for a 3-year-old tree.
TreeRecord.lastUpdateAt: timestamp | null — denormalized from latest TreeUpdate.submittedAt

TreeUpdate._description: One monthly photo confirmation. GPS is captured by device — not entered manually. Once written, never edited. Dead tree updates close the record.

photo.storagePath: string — full Firebase Storage path for deletion if needed
photo.capturedAt: timestamp — EXIF or device clock at capture
photo.gpsLat: number — GPS at time of photo, must be within 100m of tree planting location to pass validation

validationResult._description: System-computed on upload. GPS proximity check against planting coordinates.
validationResult.autoStatusSet: string | null — status the system set based on this update

TreeCardVM._description: Shape consumed by the tree list card widget. One per tree.

statusIndicator.status: enum: current | overdue | critical | unconfirmed | dead | removed
statusIndicator.statusLabel: string — Current | Overdue | Critical | Unconfirmed | Dead | Removed

dates.nextDueLabel: string | null — e.g. Due in 12 days
dates.nextDueColor: Color — green if >14 days, amber if 1–14, red if overdue

thumbnail.url: string | null — last update photo URL
thumbnail.showPlaceholder: boolean — true when no photo yet

TreeCardVM.showUpdateButton: boolean — true when status != dead && status != removed

TreeMapPinVM._description: Shape for tree map pins in map view.
TreeMapPinVM.status: enum: current | overdue | critical | unconfirmed | dead | removed
TreeMapPinVM.markerHue: double — BitmapDescriptor hue. current:120(green), overdue:30(orange), critical:0(red), unconfirmed:200(grey), dead:270(grey-purple), removed:270

TreeStatStripVM._description: The three-stat summary strip at the top of the Trees screen.
TreeStatStripVM.survivalRate: number | null — 0.0 to 1.0, null if no confirmed trees
TreeStatStripVM.survivalRateColor: Color — green if >=0.8, amber if 0.5–0.8, red if <0.5
TreeStatStripVM.overdueColor: Color — AppTheme.darkGreen if 0, amber if 1–5, amber.shade700 if 6–20, red.shade600 if >20

CreditProgressBarVM._description: The Urban Greening Credit progress bar between the toggle and the list.
CreditProgressBarVM.ctaLabel: string — e.g. Confirm 7 more trees at 90 days to unlock your first credit | First credit unlocked — apply in Verified tab
CreditProgressBarVM.progressBarColor: Color — AppTheme.accent when in progress, AppTheme.tertiary when met

EnvTreesScreenState._description: Local state for the Trees screen.
EnvTreesScreenState.filterStatus: enum: all | current | overdue | critical | unconfirmed | dead — default all
EnvTreesScreenState.selectedTreeId: string | null — for map info window and list scroll

updateSheet._description: State for the Update Tree bottom sheet — opened when Update button is tapped.
updateSheet.capturedPhotoPath: string | null — local file path before upload
updateSheet.capturedPhotoUrl: string | null — Firebase Storage URL after upload

addTreeSheet._description: State for the Add Tree FAB flow.

TreeSpecies._type: Dart enum — controlled list, not free text
